name: io.github.brainfuel/mcp-browser
title: MCP Browser
description: Native macOS browser exposing an MCP server so AI agents can drive a real WKWebView.

install.instructions: Download the signed DMG for Apple Silicon, drag MCP Browser to /Applications, launch it, then copy the bearer token and endpoint URL from Settings -> Connection. Configure your MCP client to POST JSON-RPC to http://127.0.0.1:8833/mcp with header Authorization: Bearer <token>. The Settings -> MCP Clients tab can patch the config for Claude Desktop and Codex automatically.
